item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Creamy pumpkin soup built on a base of sweet root vegetables, topped with acrisp seed and herb mix and grilled sourdough bread. Green oil and lemonyoghurt on the side (1+6+13)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Crisp falafel served with silky hummus, quinoa and fresh fattoush salad, toppedwith herbs. Crisp flatbread, sumac and pomegranate vinaigrette and garlicdressing on the side (2+8+11+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Pasta al forno with creamy ricotta, spinach and intense tomato sauce, bakeduntil golden and full of flavour (1+6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Roasted cauliflower with silky bean purée, fresh salsa verde and pomegranatesyrup, topped with brioche and walnut crumble and fresh herbs

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Penne pasta, also available as whole grain and gluten free, tossed with spinachand lima bean pesto, peas and kale, topped with parmesan grana and fresh basil.Lemon and chili sauce on the side (1+6+13+15)
